startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: List of URLs to start scraping from.

linkSelector.title: Link Selector
linkSelector.description: CSS selector for links to follow. Set to empty string to disable following links.

maxPagesPerCrawl.title: Max Pages Per Crawl
maxPagesPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of pages the scraper will open. 0 means unlimited.

selectors.title: CSS Selectors
selectors.description: Key-value pairs where the key is the field name and the value is a CSS selector. If omitted, the actor falls back to a default contact-info extraction.

pageFunction.title: Page Function
pageFunction.description: Optional custom async function body. Must return an object. Available arguments: request, page, log. Overrides CSS selectors if provided.
pageFunction.default: return { title: await page.title(), url: request.url };
